data.description:
Stale standalone dso-named argparse CLI over reconciler health records. Live health machinery is health.py (loaded by reconcile.py:549, read by ticket-bridge-status.sh). Evidence: zero references repo-wide (git grep dso-reconciler-health -> only the file itself); no test.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] git rm src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/dso-reconciler-health.py
- [ ] git grep dso-reconciler-health (excl. session-logs) returns nothing
- [ ] Full suite green
data.title: Delete orphan: rebar_reconciler/dso-reconciler-health.py
